MUST: create_session() MUST use @transaction.atomic (RNF-013)
create_session() MUST accept form object — MUST NOT accept form.cleaned_data dict (RF-005-D)
create_session() MUST set ClassSession.status='pending' on creation (RF-005-A)
create_session() MUST validate form.is_valid() before saving (RNF-003)
create_session() MUST return tuple (bool, ClassSession|None, str|None) (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: create_session() MUST NOT raise exceptions toward views (RNF-003)
create_session() MUST NOT create session with status other than pending (RF-005-A)

MUST: confirm_session() MUST use @transaction.atomic (RNF-013)
confirm_session() MUST verify session.tutor == user before confirming (RNF-002)
confirm_session() MUST set ClassSession.status='confirmed' (RF-005-A)
confirm_session() MUST accept form object and read meeting_platform from form.cleaned_data (RF-005-D)
confirm_session() MUST return tuple (bool, ClassSession|None, str|None) (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: confirm_session() MUST NOT allow non-tutor users to confirm (RNF-002)
confirm_session() MUST NOT raise PermissionDenied — MUST return (False, None, str) (RNF-003)

MUST: cancel_session() MUST use @transaction.atomic (RNF-013)
cancel_session() MUST verify session.tutor == user OR session.client == user (RNF-002)
cancel_session() MUST only cancel sessions with status in ['pending', 'confirmed'] (RF-005-A)
cancel_session() MUST set ClassSession.status='cancelled' (RF-005-A)
cancel_session() MUST return tuple (bool, ClassSession|None, str|None) (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: cancel_session() MUST NOT allow cancellation of completed sessions (RF-005-A)
cancel_session() MUST NOT raise exceptions toward views (RNF-003)

MUST: start_meeting() MUST verify session.tutor == user before starting (RNF-002)
start_meeting() MUST return tuple (bool, ClassSession|None, str|None) (RNF-004)
start_meeting() MUST set session.meeting_started=True (RF-006)
MUST_NOT: start_meeting() MUST NOT raise PermissionDenied — MUST return (False, None, str) (RNF-003)
start_meeting() MUST NOT allow non-tutor users to start meeting (RNF-002)

MUST: save_expansion_notification() MUST capture IP via geoconfig.geo.get_client_ip() inline import (RF-008-B)
save_expansion_notification() MUST capture ciudad_detectada from request.session (RF-008-A)
save_expansion_notification() MUST return tuple (bool, NotificacionExpansion|None, str|None) (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: save_expansion_notification() MUST NOT import geoconfig at module level — MUST import inline to prevent circular imports (RNF-004)
save_expansion_notification() MUST NOT raise exceptions toward views (RNF-003)

MUST: get_service_areas_for_display() MUST delegate to geoconfig.geo.get_available_service_areas() via inline import (RNF-004)
get_service_areas_for_display() MUST return list of service area objects
MUST_NOT: get_service_areas_for_display() MUST NOT import geoconfig at module level (RNF-004)
